179 F0400A_DRESS_CD F0400A_DRESS_CD F0400A Interview for Daily Preferences: Chooses Clothes Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how important it is that they choose the clothes that they wear while they are a resident in the current facility. -=Not assessed/no information
1=Very important
2=Somewhat important
3=Not very important
4=Not important at all
5=Important, but can't do or no
